overall.description: A cinematic guided tour through an ancient Greek city at night, featuring colossal bronze hoplite statues, vine-covered walkways, and torch-lit temples. The footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey's Discovery Tour mode showcases detailed historic architecture with dramatic moonlight and fire illumination.

events.description: camera moves past the left hoplite statue revealing the temple facade

agents.ego_description: ascending wide stone steps between two massive bronze hoplite statues with spears and shields

entered.detail: colossal bronze statue of a Greek hoplite holding a spear and shield
matching bronze warrior statue with crested helmet and round shield
classical Greek temple with ionic columns and red wooden doors
tall slender evergreen trees flanking the temple approach

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the base of a monumental stairway flanked by two colossal bronze hoplite statues. The camera ascends the stone steps, passing between the warriors to reveal a classical Greek temple with tall cypress trees against a dark cloudy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: vine-covered pergola walkway with stone railings

events.description: entering the shaded pergola walkway from the open temple stairs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the vine-covered pergola past groups of robed NPCs

notable_agents.action: group of robed figures conversing under the pergola shade

entered.detail: wooden trellis overhead covered with dense green vines providing shade
decorative stone balustrade with geometric patterns along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a shaded pergola walkway covered with dense vines overhead. Groups of robed NPCs stand conversing along the path as the camera passes between stone railings, with the temple now visible in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with traditional Greek residence and burning braziers

turning right toward the large residential building with lit braziers

agents.ego_description: crossing the open cobblestone plaza toward a two-story Greek residence with torch lighting

entered.detail: two-story traditional building with wooden balconies and red painted trim
large stone fire bowl with bright flames illuminating the entrance
tall stone wall covered with climbing vines and foliage

segments.scene_description: Exiting the pergola into a moonlit open plaza, the camera approaches a large Greek residence with burning braziers at its entrance. A robed NPC walks across the cobblestones as the camera turns toward the building, passing a vine-covered stone wall.

events.description: approaching the large wooden entrance doors of the building

agents.ego_description: walking along the building's side wall toward a large carved wooden doorway

notable_agents.action: child running along the building wall ahead of the camera

entered.detail: massive wooden double doors with metal studs and geometric carvings
intricately carved stone blocks with repeating square patterns

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a narrow path beside the building's decorative stone wall, passing a burning brazier. A child runs ahead as the camera approaches the large wooden entrance doors, with the building facade now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior shrine with checkered marble floors and bronze statue

events.description: entering the building through large wooden doors into torch-lit interior
approaching and circling the large bronze warrior statue in the center

agents.ego_description: entering the dimly lit temple interior and approaching a towering bronze warrior statue

group of robed visitors observing the bronze statue

life-sized or larger bronze statue of an armored warrior with sword and shield
red and white diamond-patterned marble tile flooring
large crimson tapestry with golden embroidery hanging on the back wall
lattice-style wooden window shutters with blue tinted panes

segments.scene_description: Inside the torch-lit temple, the camera explores a space with massive stone columns and checkered marble floors. A large bronze warrior statue dominates the center while visitors observe it. A red banner hangs on the far wall, and wooden shutters line the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway ascending between high building walls

events.description: exiting the building back to the exterior night environment
beginning ascent of steep stone staircase between walls

agents.ego_description: exiting the building and climbing a long flight of stone stairs between high walls

entered.detail: steep wide stone steps leading upward between building walls
tall stone wall of the temple structure with small windows

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the building back into the night air and immediately begins ascending a steep stone stairway flanked by high building walls. The entrance door falls behind as the camera climbs toward the upper levels of the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins at the base of a monumental temple entrance and winds through a torch-lit city before ascending to its upper levels. It begins by climbing a stone stairway between two colossal bronze hoplite statues, revealing a classical temple and cypress trees under a dark, cloudy sky. As the camera moves forward, it passes through a shaded pergola covered in dense vines and robed figures before emerging into a moonlit plaza where burning braziers illuminate a large Greek residence. The scene then shifts inward, gliding past a running child and through wooden doors into a torch-lit interior featuring massive stone columns, checkered marble floors, and a central bronze warrior. Finally, the camera exits the building back into the night air, immediately ascending a steep stone stairway flanked by high walls as the entrance falls away below.
